summary: Created comprehensive SKILL.md documentation following Agent Skills spec. Added n5os-bootstrap to substrate-exports.yaml for distribution to zoputer. Documentation covers quick start, personalization reference, directory structure, philosophy overview, troubleshooting, and instance maintainer guidance.
learnings: SKILL.md should focus on usage patterns, not implementation details — users need to know how to install, personalize, and update
